title: Preparation of 5M Guanidine thiocyanate L6 Inactivation Buffer
author: Nicola O'Reilly
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfevjje6

steps.title: Please select between the recipes for...
steps.instruction: Please select between the recipes for 1 L, 2 L, 4.3 L and 5.4 L L6 5 M Guanidine thiocyanate Inactivation buffer . Upon contact with acids, GuSCN can produce a toxic gas (HCN). As a precaution, GuSCN-containing buffers are prepared in a fume hood.

steps.title: Weigh out 600 g, GuSCN and...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 600 g, GuSCN and add to a 1 L beaker.

steps.title: Measure out 500 mL, 0
steps.instruction: Measure out 500 mL, 0.1 M Tris HCl and add to beaker.

steps.title: Measure out 110 mL, 0
steps.instruction: Measure out 110 mL, 0.2 M EDTA , pH 8.0 and add to beaker. Stir and heat to 60 °C if required.

steps.title: Once GuSCN is dissolved, add 13...
steps.instruction: Once GuSCN is dissolved, add 13 mL, Triton X-100 to beaker and stir well.

steps.title: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles
steps.instruction: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark...
steps.instruction: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark at solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Weigh out 1200 g, GuSCN and...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 1200 g, GuSCN and add to a 2 L beaker.

steps.title: Measure out 1000 mL, 0
steps.instruction: Measure out 1000 mL, 0.1 M Tris HCl and add to beaker.

steps.title: Measure out 220 mL, 0
steps.instruction: Measure out 220 mL, 0.2 M EDTA , pH 8.0 and add to beaker and heat to 60 °C if required.

steps.title: Once GuSCN is dissolved, add 26...
steps.instruction: Once GuSCN is dissolved, add 26 mL, Triton X-100 to beaker and stirr well.

steps.title: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles
steps.instruction: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark...
steps.instruction: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark at solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Weigh out 2
steps.instruction: Weigh out 2.4 kg, GuSCN in aliquots using a 3 L beaker and carefully add to 5 L beaker whilst stirring and heating to 60 °C . Rinse 3 L beaker with 0.4 L, 0.1 M Tris HCl . Stir manually with sterile 10 ml pipette if required.

steps.title: Measure out 1
steps.instruction: Measure out 1.6 L, 0.1 M Tris HCl and add to 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles
steps.instruction: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark...
steps.instruction: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark at solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Measure out 440 mL, 0
steps.instruction: Measure out 440 mL, 0.2 M EDTA , pH 8.0 and add to beaker.

steps.title: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard,...
steps.instruction: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard, aliquot 1 mL, 5 M guanidine thiocyanate into 2 ml tubes and replace lids.

steps.title: Label with batch and date and...
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date and store in dark at Room temperature .

steps.title: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves
steps.instruction: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves.

steps.title: Place tubes in a box clearly...
steps.instruction: Place tubes in a box clearly marked 5 M guanidine thiocyanate L6 Lysis buffer .

steps.title: Clean hood, dispose of waste and...
steps.instruction: Clean hood, dispose of waste and switch off tissue culture hood. 5 M Guanidine thiocyanate is stable at Room temperature for at least three weeks . (Boom et al, J Clin Microbiol 1990. 28, 3, 485-503 . Commercial stocks have shelf life of 18 months)

steps.title: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard,...
steps.instruction: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard, aliquot 1 mL, 5 M guanidine thiocyanate into 2 ml tubes and replace lids.

steps.title: Label with batch and date and...
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date and store in dark at Room temperature .

steps.title: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves
steps.instruction: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves.

steps.title: Place tubes in a box clearly...
steps.instruction: Place tubes in a box clearly marked 5 M guanidine thiocyanate L6 Lysis buffer .

steps.title: Clean hood, dispose of waste and...
steps.instruction: Clean hood, dispose of waste and switch off tissue culture hood. 5 M Guanidine thiocyanate is stable at Room temperature for at least three weeks . (Boom et al, J Clin Microbiol 1990. 28, 3, 485-503 . Commercial stocks have shelf life of 18 months)

steps.title: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard,...
steps.instruction: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard, aliquot 1 mL, 5 M guanidine thiocyanate into 2 ml tubes and replace lids.

steps.title: Label with batch and date and...
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date and store in dark at Room temperature .

steps.title: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves
steps.instruction: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves.

steps.title: Place tubes in a box clearly...
steps.instruction: Place tubes in a box clearly marked 5 M guanidine thiocyanate L6 Lysis buffer .

steps.title: Clean hood, dispose of waste and...
steps.instruction: Clean hood, dispose of waste and switch off tissue culture hood. 5 M Guanidine thiocyanate is stable at Room temperature for at least three weeks . (Boom et al, J Clin Microbiol 1990. 28, 3, 485-503 . Commercial stocks have shelf life of 18 months)

steps.title: Measure out 2
steps.instruction: Measure out 2.0 L, 0.1 M Tris HCl and add to 5 L beaker.

steps.title: Weigh out 3 kg, GuSCN in...
steps.instruction: Weigh out 3 kg, GuSCN in aliquots using a 3 L beaker and carefully add to 5 L beaker whilst stirring and heating to 60 °C . Rinse 3 L beaker with 0.5 L, 0.1 M Tris HCl and add to 5 L beaker. Stir manually with sterile 10 ml pipette if required.

steps.title: Measure out 550 mL, 0
steps.instruction: Measure out 550 mL, 0.2 M EDTA , pH 8.0 and add to bottle.

steps.title: Add 65 mL, Triton X-100 to bottle
steps.instruction: Add 65 mL, Triton X-100 to bottle. Swirl well to mix.

steps.title: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles
steps.instruction: Vacuum filter into sterile bottles.

steps.title: Label with batch and date
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date.

steps.title: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark...
steps.instruction: Store L6 inactivation buffer in dark at solution at Room temperature ( 15 °C – 25 °C ).

steps.title: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard,...
steps.instruction: Within a tissue culture hood cupboard, aliquot 1 mL, 5 M guanidine thiocyanate into 2 ml tubes and replace lids.

steps.title: Label with batch and date and...
steps.instruction: Label with batch and date and store in dark at Room temperature .

steps.title: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves
steps.instruction: After the aliquoting is complete, change gloves.

steps.title: Place tubes in a box clearly...
steps.instruction: Place tubes in a box clearly marked 5 M guanidine thiocyanate L6 Lysis buffer .

steps.title: Clean hood, dispose of waste and...
steps.instruction: Clean hood, dispose of waste and switch off tissue culture hood. 5 M Guanidine thiocyanate is stable at Room temperature for at least three weeks . (Boom et al, J Clin Microbiol 1990. 28, 3, 485-503 . Commercial stocks have shelf life of 18 months)

steps.title: Once GuSCN is dissolved, add 52...
steps.instruction: Once GuSCN is dissolved, add 52 mL, Triton X-100 to beaker. Stir well to mix.

steps.title: Once GuSCN is dissolved, transfer to...
steps.instruction: Once GuSCN is dissolved, transfer to 5 L single use tissue culture bottle.
